chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI Cr. Misc. A. No. 641 of 2025 Date Order with Signature of Judge For hearing of case. 12.08.2025 Raja Hassan Nawaz and Mr. Tanveer Ahmed, Advocates for the applicant a/w applicant and minor daughter. Mr. Zahid Farooq Mazari, Advocate for respondent No.1. Mr. Tahir Hussain Mangi, APG Sindh. ---------- For the reasons to be recorded, this application is disposed of in terms of the status quo articulated in the ad-interim order dated 31.07.2025 with the addition that the parties will regularly leave the minor(s) is custody given by this Court with the other / parents (non-custody) every Saturday of every week from 10:00 a.m. and return the said minor(s) to the other on the same day without fail. It is further ordered that none of the parties shall remove the minor(s) out of city without prior permission of this Court. The matter of final entitlement of custody and visitation of the minor(s) on regular basis could be assessed by the Family Guardian Court in accordance with law. J U D G E Ashraf
